overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through Kew Gardens botanical garden. The character traverses a wooded grassy area toward a large glass greenhouse, walks along its side, and rounds the corner to reveal a domed conservatory. The environment features lush vegetation and modern glass architecture under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded garden meadow with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grassy woodland toward the glass greenhouse visible ahead

entered.detail: tall leafy trees scattered throughout the garden area
large rectangular glass and metal greenhouse structure with red brick base
grassy ground cover with small yellow wildflowers

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide grassy meadow dotted with yellow wildflowers and scattered deciduous trees. A large glass greenhouse structure is visible in the distance ahead, gradually growing larger as the character approaches. The canopy of trees creates partial shade over the path.

events.description: character briefly passes behind a large tree trunk that temporarily blocks the view

agents.ego_description: walking along the left side of the large glass greenhouse structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside the glass greenhouse with the building wall on the left and open garden on the right. The trees that were on the left side of the path fall behind as the character moves forward. At around 28 seconds, the view is briefly occluded by passing behind a tree trunk.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner of greenhouse approaching domed conservatory

events.description: rounding the corner of the greenhouse reveals a large domed glass conservatory structure ahead

agents.ego_description: rounding the corner of the greenhouse and walking toward the domed conservatory

entered.detail: large white domed glass structure with curved roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character turns right around the corner of the greenhouse, revealing a large domed conservatory structure ahead in an open grassy area. The greenhouse wall moves out of view to the left as the character approaches the new domed building, which grows from a distant object to fill the center of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wooded meadow that gradually opens up to reveal a series of grand glass conservatories. It begins with a walk through a wide grassy field dotted with yellow wildflowers and deciduous trees, with a large glass greenhouse appearing as a distant focal point. As the character approaches, the scene shifts to a path alongside the greenhouse wall, where the surrounding canopy falls behind and the view is briefly occluded by a passing tree trunk. The camera then turns right around the corner of the building, causing the greenhouse wall to slide out of view to the left. Finally, the perspective opens onto a wide grassy area as a massive domed conservatory emerges and grows to fill the center of the frame.
